creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
This is most likely:
    http://bugs.sun.com/bugdatabase/view_bug.do?bug_id=6633656

with a workaround described at:
    http://www.pikopong.com/blog/2008/09/09/java-printing-fix-for-linux-with-cups/

Unlikely to be fixed, since we haven't had any update to jdk1.6 for
ages. Openjdk6 does not exhibit this problem.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
